message:
fix(down): make sweepCrossSocketZombies bidirectional for default socket (gt-y8x4)

After InitRegistry migrated to SetDefaultSocket("default"), sweepCrossSocketZombies
exited immediately when townSocket=="default", making gt down unable to sweep
zombie sessions on legacy named sockets (gt, gas-town). This caused 24 zombies
to survive gt down.

Now crossSocketTargets() returns legacy sockets when on "default", and "default"
when on a named socket — making the sweep work in both directions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
